goal: Wire @supabase/supabase-js in apps/platform. Provide browser (createBrowserClient) and server (createServerClient, createServiceClient) factories under apps/platform/lib/supabase/. Thread Clerk JWT via getToken({ template: 'supabase' }) so RLS sub claim matches clerk_user_id. Replace file-based marketplace-index read in /my-published with Supabase publishes query; short-circuit back to file read when NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is missing. Scaffold .env.example. Document Clerk JWT template setup in apps/platform/docs/SUPABASE.md.
